components.text: The source I could not verify. What I could verify was the method — and what it asks of the practitioner.

Refines qi through killing. Each life taken clears the meridians in a way standard practice does not. Endurance and the body's raw capacity to survive damage are what it builds most aggressively, with the mind sharpening alongside in a particular way. Quickness of response grows the least. The method is unambiguous about what it demands.
